Triple Whale — reality check (account level)
Attribution model / window selector is not shown because the connected Ask AI Data Connector does not expose it — it uses the Triple Whale account default. Per-ad TW + model switching needs the direct Triple Whale connection (see CLAUDE.md).

Best / worst by in-app ROAS · min spend $ · excludes legacy
Spend in the tables below is ad-level (classified) spend — it sums to the "Classified ad spend" figure in the reality-check panel, which is a share of Meta's account-level total (the rest is shown there as "Unattributed"). in-app CPA = spend÷Meta purchases · in-app ROAS = Meta revenue÷spend (Meta attribution, under-reports) · "—" = legacy/unparsed or no data · Legacy rows (old pipe format) only contribute agency via producer code.
